heading: Vessel construction bonding requirements
label: 947 Vessel construction bonding requirements
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 667 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 667 of this title

children.text: the bond is required by law; or

the Secretary or Commandant determines after investigation that the amount of the bond in excess of 20 percent of the value of the base contract quantity excluding options, would not prevent a responsible bidder or offeror from competing for award of the contract.
